creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
The port in the last tree is already updated to version 1.11.0.

The patch you sent is already mostly in the tree.

The only difference is in the do-install part.

If you want to change that part can you submit a followup with a patch 
against the latest tree and the rationale for the change?

Thank you!

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
